item.title: Punk Rock Garage Sale
item.description:
Sunday, June 21, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

Insomnia Gallery and Deep End Records are excited to announce the date for our July Punk Rock Garage Sale! If you haven’t caught on yet, these happen on the 3rd Sunday of EVERY MONTH at Bad Astronaut brewing! While summer is heating up, stay relatively cool as this event is ***ALL INDOORS!*** and the event space itself now has AC! There will be OVER 50 VENDORS inside this massive adult playground of a venue which features pool tables, foosball, air hockey, cornhole and more (and all FREE to play!) We’ve got makers, artists, collectibles, thrift and vintage, music, books, video games, movies and vendors selling so much more! If you’re looking for a gift or to treat yourself, come to Insomnia Gallery’s Punk Rock Garage Sale for a true chance to score! NEW VENDORS EVERY MONTH! We’ll mix in a few pro vendors and artists as well to bring you a truly unique market each and every month! About this event:Based on the punk rock garage sales that took place regularly at Walter’s Downtown, Insomnia Gallery has been keeping this tradition alive for the last 6 years! DIY Forever! Sale hours: 2:00pm – 6:00pm Location: Bad Astronaut Brewing at 1519 Fulton FREE street parking on Sunday in addition to their back parking lot and grass parking lot! ** INTERESTED IN SETTING UP? Contact deependhtx@gmail.com with a general description of the items you’d like to sell and we’ll get back with you asap! Table fee ranges from $15-$25 depending on setup size!

From Bad Astronaut Brewery

Event details

item.title: Quack Circle Presents: Antdot x Shimza
item.description:
Tuesday, June 23, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: White Oak Music Hall - Downstairs, 2915 N Main St, Houston, TX

Doors: 6pm This show is 21+ All General Admission Tickets are Standing Room only IMPORTANT: WHITE OAK MUSIC HALL IS A CASHLESS VENUE. Please be sure to bring a debit or credit card. TICKET PACKAGE DESCRIPTIONS: GA Tickets - Doors at 6PM. Your entry into Solistice Sessions -- Full access to floor viewing area, outside patio, music, and bars. Show up and immerse yourself in the energy from the first beat to the last. VIP Tickets - Expedited Entry Line. Beat the crowd, skip the line, and settle into an elevated viewing area with the best sightlines to the stage. Includes access to 2nd floor mezzanine and a dedicated VIP bar all night long. Tables - Everything VIP, elevated. All VIP amenities plus your own hightop or stageside table, a bottle package to start the party right, and discounted bottles once your initial package is done. The premier way to experience Solstice Sessions: reserved, stocked, and front and center. Doors: 6pm This show is 21+ All General Admission Tickets are Standing Room only. IMPORTANT: WHITE OAK MUSIC HALL IS A CASHLESS VENUE. Please be sure to bring a debit or credit card. TICKET PACKAGE DESCRIPTIONS: GA Tickets - Doors at 6PM. VIP Tickets - Expedited Entry Line. Beat the crowd, skip the line, and settle into an elevated viewing area with the best sightlines to the stage. Includes access to 2nd floor mezzanine and a dedicated VIP bar all night long. Tables - Everything VIP, elevated. All VIP amenities plus your own hightop or stageside table, a bottle package to start the party right, and discounted bottles once your initial package is done. item.title: Earlybirds Club
item.description:
Saturday, July 11, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: White Oak Music Hall - Downstairs, 2915 N Main St, Houston, TX

Doors: 6pm Earlybirds Club is a dance party for women and gender expansive folks that starts at 6pm and ends at 10pm ? because we have sh*t to do in the mornin DJ Caribbeats spins the songs that live in your bones: 80s, 90s, and 2000s pop, hip-hop, new wave, and R&B. But Earlybirds Club is more than a night out. It?s a permission slip to take up space. To be loud, weird, wild, sweaty, sparkly, sentimental, and completely yourself. It?s a judgment-free dance floor built on joy, kindness, connection, and the shared understanding that sensible footwear is a love language. And because joy is even better when it gives back, 10% of ticket proceeds go to the Susie Lee Legacy Fund, supporting nonprofits that uplift women, gender-expansive people, and communities who need it most. This show is 21+ All General Admission Tickets are Standing Room only IMPORTANT: WHITE OAK MUSIC HALL IS A CASHLESS VENUE. Please be sure to bring a debit or credit card. Doors: 6pm Earlybirds Club is a dance party for women and gender expansive folks that starts at 6pm and ends at 10pm ? because we have sh*t to do in the mornin DJ Caribbeats spins the songs that live in your bones: 80s, 90s, and 2000s pop, hip-hop, new wave, and R&B. But Earlybirds Club is more than a night out. It?s a permission slip to take up space. To be loud, weird, wild, sweaty, sparkly, sentimental, and completely yourself. It?s a judgment-free dance floor built on joy, kindness, connection, and the shared understanding that sensible footwear is a love language. And because joy is even better when it gives back, 10% of ticket proceeds go to the Susie Lee Legacy Fund, supporting nonprofits that uplift women, gender-expansive people, and communities who need it most. Bad Astronaut & Photon Air Hockey Present AIR HOCKEY DOUBLES TOURNAMENT Every Thursday | 7:30 – 10 PM | Free Entry Join us every Thursday in the taproom for our exciting Air Hockey Tournaments! item.title: Spray City Walls Graffiti Battle
item.description:
Friday, July 17, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

Spray City Walls Graffiti Battle Every 3rd Friday | 8 – 11 PM | Free Entry! Get ready to immerse yourself in a world of creativity, colors, and culture as we celebrate the beauty of art at Spray City Walls Graffiti Battle! Highlights of the event:• Live mural painting select artists• Delicious craft beers and beverages• Live music and entertainment• Artist market & vendors• Community engagement and more! Don’t miss the chance to be a part of this vibrant celebration of art and expression. Whether you’re an art enthusiast, a foodie, or just looking for a fun day out, this event has something for everyone.Save the date and spread the word! We can’t wait to share this unforgettable experience with you.

item.title: Love in the Club: 2000's Hip Hop & R&B Dance Party
item.description:
Saturday, September 5, 2026 at 9 PM

item.title: Friko Something Worth Waiting For : The Tour
item.description:
Thursday, September 10, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: White Oak Music Hall - Upstairs , 2915 N Main St,, Houston, TX

Doors: 7pm This show is ALL AGES All General Admission Tickets are Standing Room only IMPORTANT: WHITE OAK MUSIC HALL IS A CASHLESS VENUE. Please be sure to bring a debit or credit card. Friko has partnered with PLUS1 so that $1 from every ticket will go to Santa for a Day, a certified 501(c)(3) Public Charity who answers letters to Santa from kids in underserved communities. This two-pronged literacy component is vital to their mission: Volunteers helping, teaching youngsters the power of the pen? and then donors rewarding their efforts, by translating their wishes into reality, not only positively reinforces their nascent literacy skills, but it also helps participants author a different, more positive narrative about life, one sparked by optimism and the vision of a brighter future. santaforaday.org Doors: 7pm This show is ALL AGES All General Admission Tickets are Standing Room only IMPORTANT: WHITE OAK MUSIC HALL IS A CASHLESS VENUE. Please be sure to bring a debit or credit card.
